title: About
description: Developer & creative technologist building sustainable, playful, and open experiences.
body:
const{Fragment:e,jsx:n,jsxs:i}=arguments[0];function _createMdxContent(t){const r={a:"a",br:"br",em:"em",h2:"h2",h3:"h3",hr:"hr",img:"img",li:"li",p:"p",strong:"strong",ul:"ul",...t.components};return i(e,{children:[n(r.h2,{children:"Hey, I'm Sivert 👋"}),"
",i(r.p,{children:["I’m a developer and designer from Norway who loves turning ideas into real, working things. I’ve spent the past 11+ years building everything from automation tools and web apps to open-source platforms and indie games. My work often lives where ",n(r.strong,{children:"code, creativity, and sustainability"})," meet."]}),"
",i(r.p,{children:["I currently work as a ",n(r.strong,{children:"Front-end Developer at Norsk Tipping"}),", focusing on accessible, high-quality user experiences for millions of players. Alongside work, I’m pursuing a ",n(r.strong,{children:"Master’s in Interaction Design at NTNU"}),", exploring how digital design can be both ",n(r.em,{children:"beautiful and sustainable"}),"."]}),"
",n(r.p,{children:n(r.img,{src:"https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1545239351-1141bd82e8a6?auto=format&fit=crop&w=1400&q=80",alt:"Sketching interface flows on a light table"})}),"
",n(r.h3,{children:"What drives me"}),"
",i(r.ul,{children:["
",i(r.li,{children:[n(r.strong,{children:"Open source as community."})," I love building tools that people can use, learn from, and improve — like ",n(r.a,{href:"https://gryt.chat",children:n(r.strong,{children:"Gryt"})}),", an open-source voice chat platform."]}),"
",i(r.li,{children:[n(r.strong,{children:"Sustainability as performance."})," Great design shouldn’t come at the planet’s expense. My research and ",n(r.a,{href:"https://www.universitetsavisa.no/eurekaprisen-gjovik-ntnu/gjovik-disse-vant-arets-eurekapris/387933",children:"Eurekaprize-winning"})," bachelor thesis explored practical ways to make the web greener."]}),"
",i(r.li,{children:[n(r.strong,{children:"Learning by doing."})," Whether it’s training an AI model to catch shiny Pokémon or automating CS LAN tournaments with ",n(r.a,{href:"https://github.com/sivert-io/matchzy-auto-tournament",children:n(r.strong,{children:"MatchZy Auto Tournament"})}),", I’m happiest when experimenting."]}),"
"]}),"
",n(r.h3,{children:"How I work"}),"
",n(r.p,{children:"I design and prototype quickly — validating ideas early, testing with users, and refining with real data. Once the vision feels right, I bring it to life with React, TypeScript, and a focus on sustainable performance and accessible motion."}),"
",n(r.p,{children:"I like to think of code as a design material: something expressive, tactile, and full of personality when used with care."}),"
",n(r.h3,{children:"Outside the editor"}),"
",i(r.p,{children:["When I’m not coding, I’m usually making music, streaming games, or wrenching on my ",n(r.strong,{children:"Golf GTI Edition 35"})," (you might catch it on ",n(r.a,{href:"https://edition35.com",children:"edition35.com"})," — if my home server’s awake 😅).",n(r.br,{}),"
","I also love photography, video editing, and the occasional late-night Godot jam session."]}),"
",n(r.hr,{}),"
",n(r.p,{children:"If you enjoy projects that mix creativity, sustainability, and technology — we’ll probably get along. ⚡"})]})}return{default:function(e={}){const{wrapper:i}=e.components||{};return i?n(i,{...e,children:n(_createMdxContent,{...e})}):_createMdxContent(e)}};

title: Projects
description: A deeper look at experiments and product drops that shaped my practice.
body: const{jsx:n}=arguments[0];function _createMdxContent(e){const t={p:"p",...e.components};return n(t.p,{children:"Every project below includes build notes, design rationale, and behind-the-scenes process shots. Click any image to open the lightbox and zoom in on interaction details."})}return{default:function(e={}){const{wrapper:t}=e.components||{};return t?n(t,{...e,children:n(_createMdxContent,{...e})}):_createMdxContent(e)}};

title: Selected Work
description: Highlights from professional developer roles, open-source projects, and creative builds.
body:
const{Fragment:e,jsx:n,jsxs:t}=arguments[0];function _createMdxContent(r){const a={a:"a",br:"br",em:"em",h2:"h2",h3:"h3",hr:"hr",p:"p",strong:"strong",...r.components},{Icon:i}=a;return i||function(e,n){throw new Error("Expected "+(n?"component":"object")+" `"+e+"` to be defined: you likely forgot to import, pass, or provide it.")}("Icon",!0),t(e,{children:[t("div",{className:"mb-8 flex items-center gap-2",children:[n(i,{name:"FaGithub",size:24,className:"text-white/80 transition hover:text-white"}),n(i,{name:"RiLinkedinFill",size:20,className:"ml-2 text-sky-300 transition hover:text-sky-400"})]}),"
",n(a.h2,{children:"Selected Work"}),"
",n(a.h3,{children:"Norsk Tipping — Front-end Developer"}),"
",n("span",{className:"text-sm text-neutral-400",children:"Oct 2022 – Present · Hamar, Norway"}),"
",t(a.p,{children:["I’m part of the ",n(a.strong,{children:"X Games"})," team at Norsk Tipping, focusing on user-facing experiences for external games.",n(a.br,{}),"
","I work mainly with ",n(a.strong,{children:"TypeScript"}),", refactoring legacy code, improving performance, and ensuring ",n(a.strong,{children:"WCAG 2.1"})," accessibility compliance — all within a ",n(a.strong,{children:"SAFe"})," agile setup."]}),"
",t("div",{className:"mt-2 flex flex-wrap gap-2",children:[n("span",{className:"rounded bg-neutral-800 px-2 py-1 text-xs text-neutral-300",children:"TypeScript"}),n("span",{className:"rounded bg-neutral-800 px-2 py-1 text-xs text-neutral-300",children:"Accessibility"}),n("span",{className:"rounded bg-neutral-800 px-2 py-1 text-xs text-neutral-300",children:"SAFe / Agile"})]}),"
",n(a.hr,{}),"
",n(a.h3,{children:"Novicell Norge — Junior Developer"}),"
",n("span",{className:"text-sm text-neutral-400",children:"Aug 2021 – Oct 2022 · Oslo, Norway"}),"
",t(a.p,{children:["Worked across the stack for client projects — from building ",n(a.strong,{children:".NET Core"})," APIs and ",n(a.strong,{children:"Umbraco (C#)"})," modules to crafting front-end components and styling.",n(a.br,{}),"
","Used ",n(a.strong,{children:"Jira"}),", ",n(a.strong,{children:"Confluence"}),", and ",n(a.strong,{children:"Bitbucket"})," for collaboration and version control under a ",n(a.strong,{children:"Scrum"})," workflow."]}),"
",t("div",{className:"mt-2 flex flex-wrap gap-2",children:[n("span",{className:"rounded bg-neutral-800 px-2 py-1 text-xs text-neutral-300",children:"C#"}),n("span",{className:"rounded bg-neutral-800 px-2 py-1 text-xs text-neutral-300",children:".NET Core"}),n("span",{className:"rounded bg-neutral-800 px-2 py-1 text-xs text-neutral-300",children:"Umbraco"}),n("span",{className:"rounded bg-neutral-800 px-2 py-1 text-xs text-neutral-300",children:"React / Vue"})]}),"
",n(a.hr,{}),"
",n(a.h3,{children:"Open-Source & Personal Projects"}),"
",t(a.p,{children:[n(a.strong,{children:"Gryt"})," — open-source voice + text chat platform",n(a.br,{}),"
","An alternative to Discord & Teamspeak focused on performance, privacy, and community.",n(a.br,{}),"
",n(a.a,{href:"https://gryt.chat",children:"gryt.chat"})," · ",n(a.a,{href:"https://github.com/Gryt-chat",children:"GitHub"})]}),"
",t(a.p,{children:[n(a.strong,{children:"MatchZy Auto Tournament (MAT)"})," — CS tournament automation platform",n(a.br,{}),"
","Built to run Counter-Strike LANs like ",n(a.strong,{children:"NTLAN"}),", handling brackets, automation, and live updates.",n(a.br,{}),"
",n(a.a,{href:"https://github.com/sivert-io/matchzy-auto-tournament",children:"GitHub"})]}),"
",t(a.p,{children:[n(a.strong,{children:"Other experiments:"})," AI models (like one that catches shiny Pokémon 🧠), indie games in ",n(a.strong,{children:"Godot"}),", and small automation tools."]}),"
",n(a.hr,{}),"
",n(a.h3,{children:"Research & Recognition"}),"
",t(a.p,{children:["🏆 ",n(a.strong,{children:"Eurekaprize 2023"})," — Best bachelor project at NTNU (",n(a.em,{children:"Sustainable Web Design"}),").",n(a.br,{}),"
","📚 Published studies on sustainability and developer awareness in web design."]}),"
",n(a.hr,{}),"
",t("div",{className:"flex flex-wrap items-center gap-3 mt-6",children:[n(i,{name:"FaGithub",size:18,className:"text-white/70"}),n("a",{href:"https://github.com/SivertGullbergHansen",className:"text-sm text-white/70 hover:text-white transition",children:n(a.p,{children:"github.com/SivertGullbergHansen"})}),n(i,{name:"RiLinkedinFill",size:16,className:"ml-4 text-sky-300"}),n("a",{href:"https://linkedin.com/in/sivertgullberghansen",className:"text-sm text-sky-300 hover:text-sky-400 transition",children:n(a.p,{children:"linkedin.com/in/sivertgullberghansen"})})]})]})}return{default:function(e={}){const{wrapper:t}=e.components||{};return t?n(t,{...e,children:n(_createMdxContent,{...e})}):_createMdxContent(e)}};
